runtime_owner.current_owner_line: CLI/domain-entry stable capability surface with Codex-default execution and optional hosted runtime carriers
runtime_owner.active_phase: P4 mature direct grant product entry
runtime_owner.compatibility_bridge: post-R5A local runtime closeout / host-agent regression oracle

runtime_manager_boundary.layer_role: product-managed adapter/projection layer over external Hermes-Agent runtime substrate
mag_owned_truth: quality governance and review package truth
manager_consumed_projection: artifact inventory and explicit wakeup/TODO queue
OPL Rust native helper indexed workspace/session/artifact/TODO/runtime-health projections
runtime_manager_boundary.future_sidecar_promotion_gate: only if external Hermes-Agent cannot express the task/wakeup/approval/audit/product isolation contracts required by OPL

task_boundary.primary_scope: target-locked grant narrative authoring and scientific quality closure
task_boundary.target_lock_rule: Once the caller or selected workspace has explicitly locked a target funder/profile, downstream authoring and controller semantics stay within that task rather than opportunistically switching funders.
task_boundary.authoring_completion_rule: near_submission_candidate and submission_grade_candidate mean the narrative is scientifically reviewable for applicant-side inspection.
task_boundary.objective_material_policy: Administrative supplements, portal forms, signatures, ethics identifiers, and similar objective materials default to TODO and explicit wake-up follow-ups unless their absence invalidates scientific claims already used in the narrative.
task_boundary.submission_ready_relation: package submission-ready remains a stricter local export gate than MAG authoring completion.

ad_hoc_bypass_policy.local_scripts_contracts_rule: Local scripts/contracts are allowed only when schema-backed and surfaced through product-entry/user-loop/direct-entry runtime semantics; they must not bypass the MAG authoring runtime.
ad_hoc_bypass_policy.generic_document_tools_rule: Generic documents/Office tools, direct .docx edits, prompt-only drafting, hand-written export packages, and one-off ad-hoc scripts must not replace MAG grant-authoring runtime surfaces for MAG-scoped work.

ideal_target.runtime_substrate_owner: explicit hosted runtime carrier (for example Hermes-Agent)
ideal_target.direct_user_route: User or agent caller -> Med Auto Grant Product Entry -> MedAutoGrantDomainEntry -> route-selected executor or optional hosted runtime carrier -> Med Auto Grant domain logic
ideal_target.opl_gateway_route: User or agent caller -> OPL Product Entry -> OPL Runtime Manager -> external Hermes-Agent runtime substrate -> Domain Handoff -> Med Auto Grant Product Entry / MedAutoGrantDomainEntry

opl_runtime_manager.role: thin OPL-side runtime manager for profile wiring, task registration hydration, runtime status projection, doctor/repair/resume, native helper catalog, and high-frequency state indexes

phase_map.phase_name: hosted caller / OPL family-level consumption proof
